Package io.sentry.jcache

Class SentryJCacheWrapper<K,V>

java.lang.Object
io.sentry.jcache.SentryJCacheWrapper<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of key
V - the type of value
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, Iterable<javax.cache.Cache.Entry<K,V>>, javax.cache.Cache<K,V>
@Experimental public final class SentryJCacheWrapper<K,V> extends Object implements javax.cache.Cache<K,V>
Wraps a JCache Cache to create Sentry spans for cache operations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface javax.cache.Cache

    javax.cache.Cache.Entry<K extends Object,V extends Object>
